capabilities.name: full_json_report
capabilities.description: Single JSON document containing scan metadata, topology, evidence, warnings, device intelligence, optional access classification, and this capability manifest.

capabilities.name: interface_inventory
capabilities.description: Lists local interfaces, selected scan interface, addresses, gateway, and DNS context.

capabilities.name: topology_scan
capabilities.description: Builds the evidence-backed LAN device and topology view inside the validated scope.

capabilities.name: tcp_lan_sweep
capabilities.description: Uses the full profile to discover live hosts and common open services.

capabilities.name: device_intelligence
capabilities.description: Normalizes discovered devices into inventory, service, risk, OS, vendor, and UI-oriented records.

capabilities.name: nmap_service_discovery
capabilities.description: Optional Nmap TCP connect service discovery was enabled and merged into device services.

capabilities.name: access_classification
capabilities.description: Runs access-type probes and the scoring engine for DSL/VDSL/Fiber/Cable/WISP/Mobile/Satellite/Enterprise candidates.

capabilities.name: modem_collection
capabilities.description: Collects CPE candidates, gateway chain, NAT state, WAN evidence, and missing physical proof in one section.

warnings: Topology is inferred from routing and subnet membership only. No LLDP/CDP/SNMP evidence was available, so physical links are not proven.
Default device intelligence probes are read-only and limited to private/local targets.
SNMP, SSH, router APIs, TR-064, TR-181, and authenticated APIs require explicit user opt-in credentials.
No login forms, credential guessing, exploit checks, configuration changes, or print jobs are attempted.
No scoreable physical access evidence was collected.
Do not treat latency, PTR, ASN, IPv6, public IP, CGNAT, or Ethernet adapter as proof of access type.

findings.title: SMB port open

findings.safe_recommendation: Keep file sharing disabled if not needed and restrict it to trusted LAN profiles.

findings.description: 5 open services were observed on the scanning host.
findings.safe_recommendation: Review local services and disable unused listeners.

security_notes: Read-only probes only; no form submission, login attempt, credential guessing, exploitation, or public range scanning.

undetermined_without_credentials_or_phys: Physical WAN layer cannot be proven without direct CPE telemetry such as TR-064/TR-181/UPnP WANAccessType/SNMP interface data or a strong model fingerprint.
Ethernet LAN, low latency, public IP, no CGNAT, PTR, ASN, and traceroute context do not prove DSL/VDSL/Fiber/GPON/LTE/WISP.
Authenticated CPE details such as line stats, optical levels, full TR-181 InterfaceStack, and some model fields remain unavailable without user credentials.
